title: pelargonium × anais
intro: Pelargonium × anais, also known as Red Tip Geranium or Anais Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus. It is often used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × anais include relief from respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × anais can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
